Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Dec-09-2003 Text Ruling

Default Prove Up In Scd 218
Off Calendar Dec-09-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack CSR: Rhonda Fung.
Appearances:
Brenda Teig, Esq. for Plaintiff Viki Oster, also present, was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant Francisco Morales as follows:
General Damages of $29,032.52.
Special Damages of $8,010.84.
Costs of $766.80.
For the total of $37,810.16.
Judgment signed in open court.

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Dec-04-2003 Continued To Dec-09-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Valerie Papale..
At plaintiff's request, the Court continued the hearing to Dec. 9, 2003 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218.
